title: Durability visualizer
description: This resource pack shows the durability of an axe, pickaxe, hoe, shovel, and sword.
body: This resource pack shows the durability of an axe, pickaxe, hoe, shovel, and sword. Yellow tool handle - 75%-51%. Orange handle - 50%-26%. Red handle - 25%-0%. This resource pack is available from version 1.21.5
